summary: Completed comprehensive testing of RealtouchHR new features. Backend APIs are 100% functional with all new endpoints working perfectly including bulk import, PDF payslips, HMRC exports, notifications, and onboarding. Frontend successfully implements new features including bulk import page, onboarding wizard, employee detail editing, and navigation. Session management requires attention for better user experience.

ui_bugs.issue: User sessions expire quickly during testing, causing frequent redirects to login page

design_issues.issue: Notifications bell may not have proper data-testid attribute for automated testing

passed_tests: Backend health checks and all API endpoints (38/38 tests passed)
New bulk import endpoints (employee template download, CSV import)
New payroll export endpoints (PDF payslips, FPS, EPS, P32 downloads)
New notification endpoints (get notifications, mark as read)
New onboarding endpoints (progress tracking, quick employee/payrun creation)
Dashboard loads with compliance score and statistics
Bulk Import page loads with import type selection and upload zone
Bulk Import page shows download template functionality
Navigation includes Import link in sidebar
Employee detail page structure with edit forms and tabs
Pay run detail page structure with HMRC export buttons
action_item_for_main_agent: Minor improvements needed: 1) Improve session timeout settings for better user experience during extended use, 2) Add data-testid attributes to notifications bell and other interactive elements for better testability, 3) Consider adding loading states for better UX during form submissions
